subtitle.zh: 持续下注、牌面、尺寸与河牌决策
subtitle.en: C-bets, textures, sizing and river decisions

text.zh: 翻前加注者带着更强、更密的范围进入翻牌——这叫范围优势。在干燥牌面上，有位置的小额持续下注（约 33% 底池）可以高频执行：用整个范围说同一句话，让对手的弱牌立刻交租。
text.en: The preflop raiser arrives at the flop with the stronger, denser range — range advantage. On dry boards, a small in-position c-bet (about 33% pot) can fire at high frequency: the whole range speaks with one voice and weak hands pay rent immediately.

text.zh: BTN 开局、BB 跟注，翻牌 K♠7♦2♣。这张面几乎没帮到 BB 的防守范围，BTN 用 33% 底池对几乎全部范围下注，是教科书式的高频小注点。
text.en: BTN opens, BB calls, flop K♠7♦2♣. This board misses the BB's defend range almost entirely; BTN betting 33% pot with nearly everything is the textbook high-frequency small c-bet spot.

text.zh: 常见错误：在所有牌面用同一种大注「证明自己有牌」，或在湿面上闭眼全范围 c-bet——湿面利好跟注者，需要挑手牌。
text.en: Common mistakes: one big sizing everywhere to 'prove a hand,' or auto c-betting wet boards — wet textures favor the caller and demand hand selection.

text.zh: 口径：干面→小注高频；湿面→放慢脚步，挑能继续的牌再开火。
text.en: Rule of thumb: dry board → small and often; wet board → slow down and pick hands that can continue.

text.zh: 看到翻牌先别问「我中了吗」，先问「这张面利谁的范围」。高张干面（A83 彩虹）密合开局者的 AK、AQ、大对子；中低连面（7♠6♠5♦）反而撞进防守者的同花连张与小对子怀里。
text.en: Before asking 'did I hit,' ask 'whose range does this board hit.' High dry boards (A83 rainbow) mesh with the opener's AK, AQ and big pairs; low connected boards (7♠6♠5♦) crash straight into the defender's suited connectors and small pairs.

text.zh: 同样是 BTN vs BB：A♦8♣3♥ 上 BTN 可以放心高频小注；7♠6♠5♦ 上同样的自动下注会撞上 87s、65s、44 这些防守常客——这正是 BB 可以反击的面。
text.en: Same BTN vs BB: on A♦8♣3♥ the BTN fires small with confidence; on 7♠6♠5♦ the same auto-bet runs into 87s, 65s and 44 — exactly the boards where the BB fights back.

text.zh: 常见错误：把「我没中」等同于「必须放弃」，或把「我中了」等同于「必须下注」。单手牌思维让你在错误的面上做错误的事。
text.en: Common mistake: equating 'I missed' with 'give up' or 'I hit' with 'must bet.' Single-hand thinking puts the wrong action on the wrong board.

text.zh: 练习：每张翻牌停一秒，先标「利攻方 / 利守方 / 中性」，再想自己这一手。
text.en: Drill: pause one second on every flop and tag it 'raiser / defender / neutral' before thinking about your own hand.

text.zh: 半诈唬有两条赢牌路径：对手现在就弃牌，或者被跟注后听牌击中。纯诈唬只有一条腿，强听牌有两条——这就是为什么同花听、两头顺听适合主动进攻而不是被动跟注。
text.en: A semi-bluff wins two ways: the opponent folds now, or the draw arrives after a call. A pure bluff stands on one leg; a strong draw stands on two — which is why flush draws and open-enders belong on offense, not in call-and-pray mode.

text.zh: 你在 BTN 拿 A♠5♠，翻牌 K♠9♠4♦：坚果同花听加上一张超牌。下注或加注让 BB 的 9x、口袋小对当场弃牌；被跟注也仍有约三分之一的概率在后两街击中。
text.en: You hold A♠5♠ on K♠9♠4♦: the nut flush draw plus an overcard. Betting or raising folds out the BB's 9x and small pairs right now; even when called you still hit roughly a third of the time by the river.

text.zh: 常见错误：拿着强听牌只会被动跟注「等中了再说」——白白放弃弃牌权益，还把底池主动权交给对手。
text.en: Common mistake: passively calling with strong draws to 'wait and hit' — surrendering fold equity for free and handing the betting lead away.

text.zh: 组合听牌（同花听 + 顺听 / 超牌）是最好的进攻燃料；裸内听则更适合放弃或控池。
text.en: Combo draws (flush draw plus straight draw or overcards) are premium fuel for aggression; a bare gutshot mostly wants out or pot control.

text.zh: 尺寸是一门语言：小注（约 33%）说「我整个范围都在下注」，大注（75% 及以上）说「我的范围两极分化——要么很强，要么在诈唬」。先选范围想表达什么，再选尺寸。
text.en: Sizing is a language: small (about 33%) says 'my whole range is betting'; big (75%+) says 'my range is polarized — very strong or bluffing.' Decide what the range wants to say, then pick the size.

text.zh: K72 彩虹面，BTN 用 33% 对全范围施压；转牌打出 A 后改用 75% 两极下注——价值用 AK、Kx 最强档，诈唬用带阻断的听牌。
text.en: On K72 rainbow the BTN presses 33% with everything; when an ace rolls off on the turn, the sizing shifts to a polar 75% — value from AK and strong Kx, bluffs from draws with blockers.

text.zh: 常见错误：用注码暴露手牌——强牌下大注、弱牌下小注的初学者模式，等于把底牌翻给会观察的对手。
text.en: Common mistake: telegraphing with size — the beginner pattern of big-with-strong, small-with-weak shows your cards to anyone paying attention.

text.zh: 同一类局面用同一种尺寸，让价值与诈唬穿同一件外套。
text.en: Use one size per situation class, so value and bluffs wear the same coat.

title.zh: 转牌：继续开火还是收手

text.zh: 转牌是「这张牌帮了谁」的第二次投票。利好自己范围的转牌（高张、给自己补充权益的牌）支持二次开火；帮到对手范围或毫无改善时，过牌控池往往比硬打更便宜。
text.en: The turn is a second vote on 'who did that card help.' Cards that favor your range (high cards, equity-adders) support a second barrel; when the turn helps the caller or changes nothing, checking for pot control is usually cheaper than forcing it.

text.zh: K♠7♦2♣ 上 c-bet 被跟注，转牌 A♦：这张 A 几乎专属于翻前加注者的范围，继续下注让 BB 的 7x、口袋对深陷两难。换成转牌 6♠，对 BB 的连张大有帮助——刹车更聪明。
text.en: Your K♠7♦2♣ c-bet gets called and the turn is the A♦: that ace belongs almost exclusively to the raiser's range, so barreling squeezes BB's 7x and pocket pairs. Make the turn the 6♠ instead — a gift to BB's connectors — and braking is the smarter line.

text.zh: 常见错误：翻牌下注、转牌自动放弃。对手会学到「跟一条街就能拿走底池」，你的 c-bet 从此失去牙齿。
text.en: Common mistake: bet flop, auto-give-up turn. Opponents learn that one call buys the pot, and your c-bet loses its teeth.

text.zh: 二次开火前自问两件事：这张转牌偏向谁？我被跟注后还有没有计划？
text.en: Before barreling, ask two things: whom does this card favor, and do I have a plan if called?

title.en: The River: Thin Value and Bluff-Catching

text.zh: 河牌没有未来权益，只剩两个问题。下注前问：「有没有更差的牌会跟注？」有，才叫价值下注。面对下注问：「他的整条故事线连贯吗？我是否阻断他的价值、不阻断他的诈唬？」
text.en: The river has no future equity, only two questions. Before betting: 'do worse hands call?' — only then is it a value bet. Facing a bet: 'does his whole story line up, and do I block his value while unblocking his bluffs?'

text.zh: 你持 K♥Q♥，河牌面 K-8-4-2-9：顶对好踢脚做 40% 薄价值，能从 KJ、KT 与固执的 8x 那里多收一条街——这正是长期赢家与保本者的分水岭。
text.en: Holding K♥Q♥ on K-8-4-2-9, a 40% thin value bet collects one more street from KJ, KT and stubborn 8x — exactly the street that separates long-term winners from break-even players.

text.zh: 常见错误：河牌怕被加注而放弃薄价值；或者用「他肯定在诈唬」的直觉替代故事线分析去英雄跟注。
text.en: Common mistakes: skipping thin value for fear of a raise, and hero-calling on 'he must be bluffing' vibes instead of story analysis.

text.zh: 抓诈前复盘他每条街的动作：诈唬的故事，通常在某一街讲不通。
text.en: Before bluff-catching, replay his action street by street: bluff stories usually break somewhere.

title.zh: 面对下注：MDF 直觉与弃牌纪律
title.en: Facing Bets: MDF Intuition and Fold Discipline

text.zh: MDF（最低防守频率）提醒你：如果对任何下注都大面积弃牌，对手用任意两张牌诈唬都有利可图。但防守要用合格的牌——底池赔率决定你需要的权益：面对半池下注，需要约 25%。
text.en: MDF (minimum defense frequency) warns that if you fold too often to any bet, opponents profit by bluffing any two cards. But defend with qualified hands — pot odds set the equity bar: versus a half-pot bet you need about 25%.

text.zh: 底池 10bb，对手下注 5bb：跟注 5 赢 15，需要 25% 权益。你的中对加后门听牌通常够格；裸高牌则交出底池毫不可惜。
text.en: Pot 10bb, opponent bets 5bb: call 5 to win 15, so 25% equity required. Middle pair with a backdoor draw usually qualifies; naked high cards can let the pot go without regret.

text.zh: 常见错误：两个极端——「永不弃牌的好奇心」与「见注就缩的自动弃牌」。前者慢性失血，后者邀请全世界来诈唬你。
text.en: Common mistakes at both poles: never-fold curiosity that bleeds chips, and auto-folding that invites the whole table to bluff you.

text.zh: 跟注前先有计划：转牌哪些牌继续、哪些牌放弃。没有计划的跟注只是更贵的弃牌。
text.en: Have a plan before calling: which turns continue, which give up. A call without a plan is just a more expensive fold.

prompt.zh: BTN 开局、BB 跟注，翻牌 K♠7♦2♣。BTN 的标准持续下注是？
prompt.en: BTN opens, BB calls, flop K♠7♦2♣. The standard c-bet for BTN is?

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：干面 + 范围优势 = 小注高频，让弱牌交租。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: dry board plus range advantage means small and often — make weak hands pay rent.

choiceExplanations.zh: 大注会把对手能弃的牌全都吓走，强牌反而收不到钱。
choiceExplanations.en: A big bet folds out everything that might pay you; strong hands earn less.

choiceExplanations.zh: 白白放掉范围优势；这正是最该下注的牌面之一。
choiceExplanations.en: That surrenders the range advantage on one of the best betting boards there is.

objective.zh: 识别高频小额 c-bet 的标准场景。
objective.en: Recognize the standard high-frequency small c-bet spot.

prompt.zh: 持续下注的底层依据是什么？
prompt.en: What is the underlying basis of the continuation bet?

choices.zh: 加注者翻牌中牌的概率更高
choices.en: The raiser hits the flop more often

choices.zh: 加注者带着更强更密的范围进入翻牌
choices.en: The raiser arrives with the stronger, denser range

choices.zh: 先下注的人总是赢得更多
choices.en: Whoever bets first always wins more

choiceExplanations.zh: 任何两张牌中翻牌的概率都差不多——差别不在「中没中」。
choiceExplanations.en: Any two cards hit the flop about equally often — the edge is not in 'hitting.'

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：范围优势才是 c-bet 的发动机，与单手牌中没中无关。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: range advantage powers the c-bet, regardless of any single hand.

choiceExplanations.zh: 没有范围支撑的「先手必胜」是迷信，对手会用加注教育你。
choiceExplanations.en: First-in magic is superstition without a range behind it; raises will reeducate you.

objective.zh: 把 c-bet 归因到范围优势。
objective.en: Attribute the c-bet to range advantage.

prompt.zh: A♦8♣3♥ 彩虹翻牌，BTN 开局对 BB 防守。这张面更利于谁？
prompt.en: Flop A♦8♣3♥ rainbow, BTN open vs BB defend. Whom does this board favor?

choiceExplanations.zh: BB 的同花连张与小对子在 A 高干面上几乎全部落空。
choiceExplanations.en: The BB's suited connectors and small pairs almost all whiff on an ace-high dry board.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：AK、AQ、AJ 与大对子密集地住在开局者范围里。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: AK, AQ, AJ and big pairs live densely in the opener's range.

choiceExplanations.zh: 范围与牌面的密合度差距明显，这张面远非中性。
choiceExplanations.en: The mesh between range and board is lopsided — far from neutral.

objective.zh: 判断高张干面的范围归属。
objective.en: Read who owns high dry boards.

prompt.zh: 7♠6♠5♦ 这类中低连面，通常更照顾谁？
prompt.en: Low connected boards like 7♠6♠5♦ usually favor whom?

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：87s、65s、44 这些防守常客在这里组成两对、顺子与暗三条。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: defend-range staples like 87s, 65s and 44 arrive here as two pair, straights and sets.

choiceExplanations.zh: 加注者的 AK、AQ 在这张面上只剩两张高牌。
choiceExplanations.en: The raiser's AK and AQ are just two high cards on this texture.

choiceExplanations.zh: 筹码量影响可下注空间，但不改变范围与牌面的密合关系。
choiceExplanations.en: Stack size shapes bet trees, not which range meshes with the board.

objective.zh: 识别利守方的连张牌面。
objective.en: Spot connected boards that favor the defender.

prompt.zh: 半诈唬之所以强，是因为它有哪两条赢牌路径？
prompt.en: A semi-bluff is strong because it wins in which two ways?

choices.zh: 位置优势 + 筹码优势
对手立刻弃牌 + 被跟注后听牌击中
choices.en: Folds now plus hitting the draw when called

choices.zh: 下注吓人 + 表情管理
choices.en: Scary bets plus a good poker face

choiceExplanations.zh: 两者都有帮助，但都不是半诈唬定义里的那两条腿。
choiceExplanations.en: Both help, but neither is one of the semi-bluff's defining legs.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：弃牌权益与成牌权益相加，让进攻在数学上立得住。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: fold equity plus card equity make the aggression add up.

choiceExplanations.zh: 训练靠的是数学结构，不是吓唬与演技。
choiceExplanations.en: We train on math structure, not intimidation and acting.

objective.zh: 说出半诈唬的双重权益来源。
objective.en: Name the semi-bluff's two equity sources.

prompt.zh: 以下哪手牌最适合在 K♠9♠4♦ 上做进攻性的半诈唬？
prompt.en: Which hand is best suited to an aggressive semi-bluff on K♠9♠4♦?

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：组合权益最厚，弃牌权益之外还有约三分之一的命中率。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: the thickest combo equity — about a one-in-three arrival on top of fold equity.

choiceExplanations.zh: 裸内听权益太薄，更适合放弃或低成本看牌。
choiceExplanations.en: A bare gutshot is too thin; it prefers giving up or seeing cards cheaply.

choiceExplanations.zh: 小对子靠摊牌价值吃饭，膨胀底池只会请来更强的牌。
choiceExplanations.en: Small pairs live on showdown value; inflating the pot only invites better hands.

objective.zh: 按权益厚度挑选半诈唬燃料。
objective.en: Pick semi-bluff fuel by equity thickness.

prompt.zh: 两极分化的范围（很强或诈唬）通常搭配什么尺寸？
prompt.en: A polarized range (very strong or bluffing) usually pairs with which sizing?

choices.zh: 大注（约 75% 底池及以上）

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：强牌要价值最大化，诈唬要施压最大化——大尺寸同时服务两者。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: value wants maximum payment, bluffs want maximum pressure — big sizing serves both.

choiceExplanations.zh: 小注属于「全范围都在下注」的高频策略。
choiceExplanations.en: Small sizing belongs to the whole-range, high-frequency story.

choiceExplanations.zh: 最小下注几乎不施压，让对手用任何牌都能便宜继续。
choiceExplanations.en: A min-bet applies no pressure and lets anything continue cheaply.

objective.zh: 把两极范围与大尺寸配对。
objective.en: Pair polarized ranges with big sizes.

prompt.zh: 33% 底池的小额下注，通常在表达什么？
prompt.en: What does a 33% pot bet usually communicate?

choices.zh: 「我的整个范围都在高频下注」
choices.en: 'My whole range is betting at high frequency'

choiceExplanations.zh: 把尺寸和单手牌强度划等号，正是会被读穿的初学者模式。
choiceExplanations.en: Equating size with single-hand strength is exactly the readable beginner pattern.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：小注是范围下注的语言——强牌、中等牌与诈唬穿同一件外套。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: small is the range-bet language — value, mediums and bluffs in one coat.

choiceExplanations.zh: 尺寸表达策略结构，不表达情绪。
choiceExplanations.en: Sizing speaks strategy structure, not emotion.

objective.zh: 读懂小尺寸的范围含义。
objective.en: Decode the range meaning of small sizing.

prompt.zh: K♠7♦2♣ 上你 c-bet 被跟注，转牌 A♦。这张转牌对你（翻前加注者）意味着什么？
prompt.en: Your c-bet on K♠7♦2♣ gets called; the turn is the A♦. For you (the raiser) this card means?

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：A 几乎专属加注者范围，二次开火让 7x 与口袋对进退两难。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: the ace belongs to the raiser's range; a second barrel squeezes 7x and pocket pairs.

choiceExplanations.zh: 这张 A 大多数时候打不到防守者的范围——怕它没有依据。
choiceExplanations.en: That ace mostly misses the defender's range — fearing it has no basis.

choiceExplanations.zh: 每张转牌都在重新分配范围优势，没有「无关」的牌。
choiceExplanations.en: Every turn re-divides range advantage; no card is irrelevant.

objective.zh: 用「这张牌帮了谁」指导转牌开火。
objective.en: Barrel turns by asking whom the card helped.

prompt.zh: 转牌既没改善你的牌，也更可能帮到对手范围时，默认选择是？
prompt.en: When the turn improves nothing for you and likely helps the caller's range, the default is?

choiceExplanations.zh: 硬打坏转牌是给对手的范围送钱。
choiceExplanations.en: Forcing bad turns donates to the range that just improved.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：刹车不是认输，是把底池控制在自己牌力匹配的尺寸。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: braking is not surrender — it keeps the pot sized to your hand.

choiceExplanations.zh: 还没人下注，弃什么牌？过牌之后再根据行动决策。
choiceExplanations.en: Nobody has bet yet — check first, then decide against real action.

objective.zh: 学会在坏转牌上踩刹车。
objective.en: Learn to brake on bad turns.

prompt.zh: 河牌价值下注的判断标准是什么？
prompt.en: What is the test for a river value bet?

choices.zh: 我的牌在绝对牌力上够强
choices.en: My hand is strong in absolute terms

choiceExplanations.zh: 绝对强度不重要——重要的是相对于会跟注的范围。
choiceExplanations.en: Absolute strength is beside the point — only relative to what calls.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：没有更差的跟注者，下注就只剩被加注和被更强跟注两种坏结局。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: without worse callers, a bet can only get raised or called by better.

choiceExplanations.zh: 对方有筹码只说明能跟，不说明会用更差的牌跟。
choiceExplanations.en: Deep stacks mean a call is possible, not that worse hands make it.

objective.zh: 用「更差会跟」校准价值下注。
objective.en: Calibrate value bets by 'worse hands call.'

prompt.zh: 河牌抓诈时，最该检查的是什么？
prompt.en: When bluff-catching on the river, the key check is?

choices.en: How strong my gut feeling is

choices.zh: 对手整条故事线是否连贯，及我的阻断牌
choices.en: Whether his street-by-street story holds, plus my blockers
How much I have already invested

choiceExplanations.zh: 直觉需要证据背书，否则只是情绪。
choiceExplanations.en: Gut feelings need evidence behind them; otherwise they are mood.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：诈唬的故事常在某一街讲不通；阻断价值、不阻断诈唬的牌最适合抓。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: bluff stories usually break on some street; hands that block value and unblock bluffs catch best.

choiceExplanations.zh: 已投入的是沉没成本，与这次跟注是否+EV 无关。
choiceExplanations.en: Money already in is sunk; it has no vote on whether this call is +EV.

objective.zh: 用故事线 + 阻断牌做抓诈决策。
objective.en: Bluff-catch with story analysis and blockers.

prompt.zh: 底池 10bb，对手下注 5bb（半池）。跟注所需的最低权益约为？
prompt.en: Pot 10bb, opponent bets 5bb (half pot). The minimum equity to call is about?

choiceExplanations.en: Correct: call 5 to win 15, and 5 ÷ 20 = 25%.

choiceExplanations.zh: 50% 是「不亏」的摊牌均势，不是赔率给出的门槛。
choiceExplanations.en: Fifty percent is coin-flip parity, not the threshold pot odds set.

choiceExplanations.zh: 33% 对应的是跟注底池大小的下注。
choiceExplanations.en: Thirty-three percent answers a full pot-sized bet.

objective.zh: 把底池赔率换算成权益门槛。
objective.en: Convert pot odds into an equity bar.

prompt.zh: MDF（最低防守频率）这个概念提醒我们什么？
prompt.en: What does the MDF concept warn us about?

choices.zh: 每次被下注都必须跟注
弃牌过度会让任意两张牌的诈唬变得有利可图

choiceExplanations.zh: MDF 是频率下限的警戒线，不是「永不弃牌」的命令。
choiceExplanations.en: MDF is a frequency floor, not a never-fold order.

choiceExplanations.zh: 正确：自动弃牌站会被全桌当提款机；防守要到位，但用合格的牌。
choiceExplanations.en: Correct: auto-folders get farmed by the whole table; defend enough, with qualified hands.

choiceExplanations.zh: 恰恰相反——对手弃牌过度时，诈唬正是惩罚手段。
choiceExplanations.en: Quite the opposite — bluffs are how over-folders get punished.

objective.zh: 理解 MDF 防剥削的本质。
